title: Saiteki-ka suru
description: A lightweight FPS boost modpack for low-end PCs
body:
### **Saiteki-ka suru – The Ultimate FPS Boost Modpack!**

Tired of lag? Meet Saiteki-ka suru, a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack designed to squeeze out 100+ FPS even on low-end PCs!

✅ Optimized for performance without sacrificing vanilla feel ✅ Smooth gameplay with better visuals and lighting ✅ Lightweight, clean, and stable – perfect for laptops & older systems ✅ Explore, build, and fight with less stutter and more fun!

Saiteki-ka suru: play smarter, run faster, and transform your Minecraft into a buttery-smooth experience.
